metadata.description: Ready-to-use agent skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing. 134 skills grouped into 5 domain plugins.

plugins.name: scientific-bio
plugins.description: Life sciences: bioinformatics, genomics, single-cell, clinical, cheminformatics-for-biology, medical imaging, drug discovery. 49 skills.

plugins.name: scientific-chem-phys
plugins.description: Chemistry, physics, quantum computing, materials science, symbolic math, astrophysics. 10 skills.

plugins.name: scientific-data-ml
plugins.description: Machine learning, statistics, numerical computing, time series, visualization, data frames, GPU optimization. 28 skills.

plugins.name: scientific-research-writing
plugins.description: Research workflow and scientific publishing: literature search, citation management, peer review, writing, slides, posters, grants. 38 skills.

plugins.name: scientific-lab-integrations
plugins.description: Lab platform SDKs and cloud lab integrations: Benchling, DNAnexus, LabArchive, LatchBio, OMERO, Opentrons, protocols.io, Ginkgo, PyLabRobot. 9 skills.
